hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】“WarshGPT”：华尔街如何适应美联储的新沟通时代；【CRYPTO】实时更新：随着油价飙升削弱风险市场的力量，比特币跌破 66,000 美元；【CRYPTO】油价突破 85 美元，比特币从一个月高位回落，通胀担忧再度浮现。

items.title: 'WarshGPT': How Wall Street is adapting to the Fed's new era of communication
items.summary: Investment firms are readying for an era with less public commentary from the U.S. central bank. Some are relying on AI for an edge.
items.title_zh: “WarshGPT”：华尔街如何适应美联储的新沟通时代
items.summary_zh: 投资公司正在为迎接美联储公开评论较少的时代做好准备。有些人依靠人工智能来获得优势。

items.title: Live updates: Bitcoin slips under $66,000 as oil's surge sacks strength from risk markets
items.summary: Later on Wednesday, Alphabet's earnings should give a sign of whether the hundreds of billions going into AI is paying off.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：随着油价飙升削弱风险市场的力量，比特币跌破 66,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 周三晚些时候，Alphabet 的财报应该会表明投入人工智能的数千亿美元是否得到了回报。

items.title: Bitcoin retreats from one-month high as oil tops $85, inflation concerns resurface
items.summary: BTC retreated from a one-month high as WTI crude topped $85 for the first time since June, reigniting inflation concerns and pushing investors toward gold, silver and the safety of bitcoin over altcoins.
items.title_zh: 油价突破 85 美元，比特币从一个月高位回落，通胀担忧再度浮现
items.summary_zh: 随着 WTI 原油自 6 月以来首次突破 85 美元，比特币从一个月高位回落，重新引发通胀担忧，促使投资者转向黄金、白银和安全的比特币而不是山寨币。

items.title: Kraken parent expands tokenized stocks to Hong Kong, UK and South Korea equities
items.summary: Payward's xStocks pushes beyond U.S. equities as competition to bring global stock markets onchain accelerates.
items.title_zh: Kraken 母公司将代币化股票扩展到香港、英国和韩国股票
items.summary_zh: 随着全球股票市场链上竞争的加剧，Payward 的 xStocks 超越了美国股票市场。

items.title: BIS warns USD stablecoins can evade capital controls, challenging traditional market regulations
items.summary: BIS says that FX restrictions and capital controls are less effective against stablecoins than against foreign currency bank deposits.
items.title_zh: 国际清算银行警告美元稳定币可以逃避资本管制，挑战传统市场监管
items.summary_zh: 国际清算银行表示，外汇限制和资本管制针对稳定币的效果不如针对外币银行存款的效果。

items.title: A better way to turn 2D designs into 3D models for rapid prototyping
items.summary: Researchers developed an automated framework that helps AI models generate CAD programs more accurately and efficiently.
items.title_zh: 将 2D 设计转变为 3D 模型以进行快速原型设计的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一个自动化框架，帮助 AI 模型更准确、更高效地生成 CAD 程序。

items.title: New method aims to keep kids safe from illegal AI-generated content
items.summary: Researchers developed an auditing technique to test generative AI models for malicious capabilities, without prompting them for illegal outputs.
items.title_zh: 新方法旨在保护孩子免受非法人工智能生成内容的侵害
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种审计技术来测试生成人工智能模型的恶意功能，而不提示它们进行非法输出。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Threatens Retaliation Against Civilian Targets if Iran Strikes in Strait
items.summary: President Trump said the United States would target a bridge or power plant, including in or near the Iranian capital, if Iran fired on the Strait of Hormuz. Secretary of State Marco Rubio earlier suggested that Tehran was “not serious” about diplomacy.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普威胁称，如果伊朗袭击海峡，将对平民目标进行报复
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，如果伊朗向霍尔木兹海峡开火，美国将瞄准一座桥梁或发电厂，包括伊朗首都或其附近的一座桥梁或发电厂。国务卿马可·卢比奥早些时候表示，德黑兰对外交“并不认真”。

items.title: Here's why bitcoin bulls should take a closer look at interest rates
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for July 22, 2026
items.title_zh: 这就是为什么比特币多头应该仔细研究利率
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 7 月 22 日天气预报

items.title: Balance stablecoin collapses 99% after $1 million exploit drains its bitcoin vaults
items.summary: An attacker fed the lending system a fake, abnormally low bitcoin price, liquidated vaults that should have been safe, and pocketed the difference in a single transaction.
items.title_zh: Balance 稳定币在比特币金库遭受 100 万美元的攻击后暴跌 99%
items.summary_zh: 攻击者向借贷系统提供了虚假的、异常低的比特币价格，清算了本应安全的金库，并通过单笔交易将差价收入囊中。

items.title: Satsuma shareholders approve bitcoin treasury liquidation and London delisting
items.summary: The vote comes less than a year after UK-based Satsuma Technology raised $218 million to pursue its bitcoin strategy.
items.title_zh: 萨摩藩股东批准比特币金库清算和伦敦退市
items.summary_zh: 此次投票是在英国 Satsuma Technology 筹集 2.18 亿美元以推行其比特币战略之后不到一年。

items.title: Tiny robot boats build floating structures
items.summary: MIT researchers developed FloatForm, a swarm of small aquatic robots that snap together like ants forming a raft, assembling into reconfigurable structures on the water.
items.title_zh: 微型机器人船建造浮动结构
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了 FloatForm，这是一群小型水生机器人，它们像蚂蚁形成木筏一样聚集在一起，在水上组装成可重新配置的结构。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Bets against SpaceX grow to 32% of float as Elon Musk warns short sellers won't survive
items.summary: About 206 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 32% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克警告卖空者将无法生存，做空 SpaceX 的押注增至流通股的 32%
items.summary_zh: 据 S3 称，目前约有 2.06 亿股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占该公司可公开交易流通股的 32%。

items.title: As the U.S.-Iran war heats up again, these parts of the stock market and economy could be affected
items.summary: Investors and economists are deliberating what the latest exchange in hostilities will mean for the broader economy.
items.title_zh: 美伊战争再度升温，股市和经济这些部分可能受到影响
items.summary_zh: 投资者和经济学家正在考虑最新的敌对行动对整体经济意味着什么。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says markets underestimate risks and he wouldn't buy stocks or Treasurys at current prices
items.summary: Comments from JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon contrast with investors' recent willingness to look past wars, tariffs and other shocks.
items.title_zh: 杰米戴蒙表示市场低估了风险，他不会以当前价格购买股票或国债
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙的言论与投资者最近愿意忽视战争、关税和其他冲击的态度形成鲜明对比。

items.title: Capital One bet big on Discover. Now it must prove the gamble was worth it
items.summary: Tuesday evening's second-quarter earnings report is the perfect stage to do just that.
items.title_zh: 第一资本在 Discover 上下了大赌注。现在必须证明这场赌博是值得的
items.summary_zh: 周二晚上的第二季度收益报告是实现这一目标的完美舞台。

items.title: Coinbase trading results may fall short of expectations, according to prediction markets
items.summary: Speculators think in the company's second quarter earnings report, it will show trading volume fell for a third consecutive quarter.
items.title_zh: 市场预测称Coinbase交易结果可能达不到预期
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为，在该公司第二季度财报中，将显示交易量连续第三个季度下降。

items.title: Kalshi adds 3 million new users as prediction market capitalizes on the World Cup
items.summary: The prediction market has launched some ads featuring soccer players, as well as formed a partnership to display its brand in more places during the tournament.
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场利用世界杯，Kalshi 增加了 300 万新用户
items.summary_zh: 预测市场推出了一些以足球运动员为主角的广告，并建立了合作伙伴关系，在比赛期间在更多地方展示其品牌。

items.title: Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests
items.summary: Oleksandr Syrskyi is dismissed after backlash over the removal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.
items.title_zh: 经过数天的抗议后，泽伦斯基解雇了乌克兰最高陆军司令
items.summary_zh: 亚历山大·西尔斯基 (Oleksandr Syrskyi) 在因受欢迎的国防部长米哈伊洛·费多罗夫 (Mykhailo Fedorov) 免职而遭到强烈反对后被解雇。

items.title: Iran war has cost US $37.5bn so far, Hegseth says, as Pentagon seeks billions more
items.summary: The hearing was disrupted by protests and a shouting match as Hegseth testified at a pivotal time in the war.
items.title_zh: 赫格斯表示，伊朗战争迄今已造成 375 亿美元损失，五角大楼正在寻求数十亿美元的额外援助
items.summary_zh: 赫格斯在战争的关键时刻作证时，听证会因抗议和争吵而中断。

items.title: India's Modi government under growing pressure as 'cockroach' protests intensify
items.summary: The CJP got a boost on Tuesday when the opposition Congress party demonstrated outside the PM's house.
items.title_zh: 印度“蟑螂”抗议活动愈演愈烈，莫迪政府面临越来越大的压力
items.summary_zh: 周二，当反对党国大党在总理官邸外示威时，人民党得到了提振。

items.title: France passes law banning under-15s from social media
items.summary: The law will require social media platforms in France to verify all users age from January.
items.title_zh: 法国通过法律禁止15岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
items.summary_zh: 该法律将要求法国的社交媒体平台从一月份起验证所有用户的年龄。

items.title: Ukraine’s New Military Chief Faces a Monumental Test
items.summary: Maj. Gen. Mykhailo Drapatyi faces a balancing act between asserting the independence favored by military reformers and accommodating political input on battlefield strategy.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰新任军事首长面临重大考验
items.summary_zh: 米哈伊洛·德拉帕蒂 (Mykhailo Drapatiy) 少将面临着一个平衡问题，既要维护军事改革者所青睐的独立性，又要在战场战略上接受政治投入。

items.title: Firing of Ukraine’s Top General Signals the End of an Era
items.summary: Gen. Oleksandr Syrskyi, who commanded crucial battles, oversaw an expansion of drone warfare against Russia, but many Ukrainians want even more.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰最高将军被解雇标志着一个时代的结束
items.summary_zh: 指挥了关键战役的亚历山大·西尔斯基将军（Oleksandr Syrskyi）监督了针对俄罗斯的无人机战的扩大，但许多乌克兰人想要更多。

items.title: Iran’s Neighbors Long for a Deal, Any Deal, to End the War
items.summary: Business owners in Pakistan are getting impatient for a chance to finally trade goods and oil along their long shared border with Iran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗的邻国渴望达成一项协议，任何协议，以结束战争
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦的企业主们迫不及待地希望有机会最终能够沿着与伊朗的长期共同边境进行货物和石油贸易。

items.title: Inside the Fight to Rid South Africa of Black Immigrants
items.summary: As immigration surges in the country, activists are going to extreme lengths to expel foreign nationals, often taking the law into their own hands.
items.title_zh: 消除南非黑人移民的斗争
items.summary_zh: 随着该国移民激增，活动人士不遗余力地驱逐外国人，常常将法律掌握在自己手中。

items.title: Midnight token rebounds 19% after Wanchain bridge hack, Hoskinson calls for ZK revamp
items.summary: Charles Hoskinson says the exploit, which briefly sent NIGHT to an all-time low, underscores why the industry needs to move beyond legacy bridge infrastructure.
items.title_zh: Wanchain 桥被黑客攻击后 Midnight 代币反弹 19%，Hoskinson 呼吁 ZK 改造
items.summary_zh: 查尔斯·霍斯金森 (Charles Hoskinson) 表示，该漏洞曾一度导致 NIGHT 跌至历史最低点，这凸显了该行业需要超越传统桥梁基础设施的原因。

items.title: SecondFi to shut down after $2.4 million ADA wallet theft
items.summary: The breach stemmed from a vulnerability in transaction signing software that enabled the derivation of private keys from blockchain transaction data.
items.title_zh: SecondFi 因 ADA 钱包被盗 240 万美元而关闭
items.summary_zh: 此次泄露源于交易签名软件中的一个漏洞，该软件可以从区块链交易数据中派生私钥。

items.title: Trump-backed crypto ethics rule puts DOJ in charge of enforcement, prohibits federal officials from issuing cryptocurrencies: sources
items.summary: Newly approved ethics language signed by President Donald Trump would prohibit federal officials from issuing cryptocurrencies.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的加密道德规则让司法部负责执法，禁止联邦官员发行加密货币：消息来源
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统签署的新批准的道德语言将禁止联邦官员发行加密货币。

items.title: Congress weighs its role as fight over sports betting prediction market oversight forges on
items.summary: As state and federal regulators continue to clash over who should oversee sports-related prediction markets, lawmakers consider stepping in.
items.title_zh: 随着体育博彩预测市场监管之争的加剧，国会正在权衡其作用
items.summary_zh: 随着州和联邦监管机构继续就谁应该监管体育相关预测市场发生冲突，立法者考虑介入。

items.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.
items.title_zh: 美国正在通过州和联邦行动推进人工智能安全
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了人工智能治理的“反向联邦制”方法，其中州法律帮助建立安全、民主人工智能的国家框架。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Helping AI models to meet the real world
items.summary: Through research and entrepreneurship, Professor Devavrat Shah is helping to design methods that can handle constant decision-making using limited computational resources.
items.title_zh: 帮助AI模型满足现实世界
items.summary_zh: 通过研究和创业，Devavrat Shah 教授正在帮助设计能够使用有限的计算资源处理持续决策的方法。

items.title: Kalshi launches election hub for prediction markets ahead of midterms
items.summary: The company said the page gives viewers of its event contracts a central place to see speculators' outlook for the midterm elections.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希在中期选举前推出预测市场选举中心
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示，该页面为其活动合约的查看者提供了一个了解投机者对中期选举前景的中心位置。

items.title: Goldman Sachs creates private markets platform as rich investors seek the next SpaceX and Stripe
items.summary: Goldman Sachs is launching a new alternative investments platform aimed at giving wealthy clients and family offices direct stakes in private companies.
items.title_zh: 高盛创建私募市场平台，富有投资者寻求下一个 SpaceX 和 Stripe
items.summary_zh: 高盛正在推出一个新的另类投资平台，旨在让富裕客户和家族办公室直接持有私营公司的股份。

items.title: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris suburbs
items.summary: Daniel Siad, whose name appears in the Epstein files thousands of times, had previously denied knowledge of the threat Jeffrey Epstein posed.
items.title_zh: 与爱泼斯坦有关的模特星探在巴黎郊区被发现死亡
items.summary_zh: 丹尼尔·西亚德的名字在爱泼斯坦的档案中出现了数千次，他此前否认了解杰弗里·爱泼斯坦构成的威胁。

items.title: After Decades of Caution, Germany Is Shaking Up How It Makes Weapons
items.summary: As threats from Moscow rise and support from Washington dwindles, the German military is reinventing how it researches, funds and wields 21st-century arms.
items.title_zh: 经过数十年的谨慎之后，德国正在改变其武器制造方式
items.summary_zh: 随着来自莫斯科的威胁上升和华盛顿的支持减少，德国军方正在重塑其研究、资助和运用 21 世纪武器的方式。

items.title: 3 Myths Fueling Anti-Immigrant Sentiment in South Africa
items.summary: As the nation convulses with protests and violence, data and research suggest that some of the biggest arguments against foreigners don’t stand up against the facts.
items.title_zh: 助长南非反移民情绪的 3 个谣言
items.summary_zh: 当全国因抗议和暴力而震动之际，数据和研究表明，一些针对外国人的最大论点并不符合事实。

items.title: AI models escaped OpenAI’s sandbox and hit Hugging Face. Crypto is where that gets dangerous
items.summary: OpenAI said the systems had their cyber guardrails lowered for an internal benchmark, but the incident shows how autonomous exploit chains could pose a deeper threat to smart contracts.
items.title_zh: AI 模型逃离了 OpenAI 的沙箱并撞上了 Hugging Face。加密货币是危险的地方
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 表示，为了内部基准，这些系统降低了网络护栏，但该事件表明自主漏洞链可能对智能合约构成更深层次的威胁。

items.title: Pakistan launches crypto investigation unit to crack down on digital asset crimes: report
items.summary: FIA's Muhammad Athar Waheed suggested that other major agencies form dedicated teams to tackle digital asset crimes.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦成立加密货币调查部门以打击数字资产犯罪：报告
items.summary_zh: 国际汽联的穆罕默德·阿塔尔·瓦希德建议其他主要机构组建专门团队来应对数字资产犯罪。

items.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
items.summary: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.
items.title_zh: 推出适用于小型企业的 ChatGPT 计划
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT for Small Businesses 计划，帮助企业家培养 AI 技能、自动化工作并与 ChatGPT Work 一起成长。

items.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
items.summary: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 与 Hugging Face 合作解决模型评估期间的安全事件
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Hugging Face 分享了人工智能模型评估期间安全事件的早期发现，强调了先进的网络功能和防御者的经验教训。

items.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
items.summary: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.
items.title_zh: 长视野模型时代的安全性和对准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 分享了部署长期运行的人工智能模型的经验教训，强调了新的安全风险、观察到的故障以及通过迭代部署改进的保障措施。

items.title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.
items.title_zh: 为什么青少年应该获得安全的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过适合年龄的保护、学习工具、家长控制和专家合作伙伴关系，让 ChatGPT 对青少年来说更安全。

items.title: Newer Models, Same Advantage
items.title_zh: 更新型号，同样的优势

items.title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn’t.
items.title_zh: 模型路由很简单。直到它不是。

items.title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
items.title_zh: 本机速度 vLLM 变压器建模后端

items.title: 3 Google updates from Galaxy Unpacked 2026
items.summary: We shared how Samsung users can boost productivity and get time back on new foldables, watches, and glasses coming soon.
items.title_zh: Galaxy Unpacked 2026 的 3 项 Google 更新
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了三星用户如何提高工作效率并节省时间购买即将推出的新款可折叠设备、手表和眼镜。

items.title: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
items.summary: Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids make video creation easier than ever.
items.title_zh: 通过两项 Google Vids 更新创建、编辑视频并为其加注星标
items.summary_zh: Gemini Omni 和 Google Vids 中的个人头像让视频创作变得比以往更容易。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: China's car market heads for worst year since 2021 as sales plunge 20%
items.summary: Consumer demand for cars in China tumbles following record-high sales of 23.7 million units in 2025.
items.title_zh: 中国汽车市场将迎来2021年以来最糟糕的一年销量暴跌20%
items.summary_zh: 继 2025 年销量创历史新高 2370 万辆之后，中国消费者对汽车的需求大幅下降。

items.title: US to announce deal allowing Saudi Arabia a nuclear programme, reports say
items.summary: The agreement would fulfil a long-held Saudi ambition but could attract concern in Israel and from some US lawmakers.
items.title_zh: 报道称，美国将宣布允许沙特阿拉伯实施核计划的协议
items.summary_zh: 该协议将实现沙特长期以来的野心，但可能引起以色列和一些美国立法者的担忧。

items.title: Ukrainian drones hit more sites of Russian online retailer Wildberries
items.summary: Logistics hubs belonging to Wildberries in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were struck overnight.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯在线零售商 Wildberry 的更多网站
items.summary_zh: 克拉斯诺达尔和斯塔夫罗波尔地区 Wildberry 的物流中心一夜之间遭到袭击。

items.title: Tokyo urges men to wear shorts to work, but some women say it's 'leg hair harassment'
items.summary: The Tokyo Metropolitan Government wants workers to ditch the suit and tie for t-shirts, trainers - and shorts.
items.title_zh: 东京敦促男性穿短裤上班，但一些女性称这是“腿毛骚扰”
items.summary_zh: 东京都政府希望工人们抛弃西装和领带，改穿 T 恤、运动鞋和短裤。

items.title: Police station opens at Hitler's birthplace in bid to rid site of Nazi link
items.summary: The opening follows years of controversy about what to do with the 17th-Century former inn, where the Nazi dictator was born.
items.title_zh: 希特勒出生地设立警察局，以消除与纳粹的联系
items.summary_zh: 多年来，关于如何处理纳粹独裁者出生的 17 世纪前旅馆的争议一直存在。

items.title: US renews strikes on Iran as Trump threatens to attack underground nuclear site
items.summary: The US president's threat to target a key Iranian nuclear site came ahead of the 11th consecutive night of attacks.
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁攻击地下核设施，美国再次对伊朗发动打击
items.summary_zh: 在连续 11 晚发生袭击之前，美国总统威胁要袭击伊朗的一个重要核设施。

items.title: Expected U.S.-Saudi Nuclear Deal Fuels Israeli Concerns of Regional Arms Race
items.summary: An Israeli minister sought to downplay the deal, but critics said it could spur other regional countries to pursue a nuclear program, and potentially the creation of a bomb.
items.title_zh: 预期的美国与沙特核协议加剧以色列对地区军备竞赛的担忧
items.summary_zh: 以色列一位部长试图淡化该协议，但批评人士表示，该协议可能会刺激该地区其他国家实施核计划，并有可能制造炸弹。

items.title: A Lettuce-Growing Region in Mexico Stomachs the Fallout From the Cyclospora Outbreak
items.summary: In central Mexico, a lettuce-growing region has been potentially linked to an outbreak in the U.S. that has sickened thousands.
items.title_zh: 墨西哥生菜种植区承受了环孢菌爆发的影响
items.summary_zh: 在墨西哥中部，一个生菜种植区可能与美国爆发的一场生菜疫情有关，这场疫情已导致数千人患病。

items.title: Japan Is Startled by Prime Minister’s Grueling Sleep Schedule
items.summary: Sanae Takaichi has said she gets just “zero to three hours” of sleep a night, prompting a debate in the country over work-life balance.
items.title_zh: 日本对首相严格的睡眠时间表感到震惊
items.summary_zh: 高市早苗表示，她每晚只睡“零到三个小时”，这在国内引发了关于工作与生活平衡的争论。

items.title: Forget Nvidia: The next big AI trade could be crypto and blockchain
items.summary: Franklin Templeton’s Sandy Kaul and Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire argue that as autonomous AI agents start spending money on their own, blockchain networks will power the next big AI trade.
items.title_zh: 忘记英伟达：下一个大型人工智能交易可能是加密货币和区块链
items.summary_zh: 富兰克林邓普顿的 Sandy Kaul 和 Circle 首席执行官 Jeremy Allaire 认为，随着自主人工智能代理开始自己花钱，区块链网络将为下一个大型人工智能贸易提供动力。

items.title: Kalshi rolls out Midterm Hubs ahead of the November elections in the U.S.
items.summary: The prediction markets platform seeks to position itself as the primary source for election odds ahead of the midterm elections this year.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 在美国 11 月大选前推出中期中心
items.summary_zh: 该预测市场平台力求将自己定位为今年中期选举之前选举赔率的主要来源。

items.title: Zilliqa halts native transactions over bug in its Ledger app dating to 2019
items.summary: Zilliqa halted native transactions after revealing a bug in its Ledger app dating to 2019 that exposed private keys via onchain signatures.
items.title_zh: Zilliqa 因 Ledger 应用程序中可追溯至 2019 年的错误而停止原生交易
items.summary_zh: Zilliqa 在披露其 Ledger 应用程序中的一个可追溯至 2019 年的错误后，停止了本地交易，该错误通过链上签名暴露了私钥。

items.title: US seeks forfeiture of $25 million in crypto tied to global fraud investigations
items.summary: US prosecutors seek forfeiture of $25 million in crypto recovered from five investigations into international fraud and laundering networks.
items.title_zh: 美国寻求没收与全球欺诈调查有关的 2500 万美元加密货币
items.summary_zh: 美国检察官要求没收从五项国际欺诈和洗钱网络调查中追回的 2500 万美元加密货币。

items.title: HTX keeps rotating wallets to evade UK sanctions screening: TRM Labs
items.summary: UK authorities sanctioned the crypto exchange in May for its alleged role in facilitating Russian sanctions evasion.
items.title_zh: HTX 不断轮换钱包以逃避英国制裁筛查：TRM 实验室
items.summary_zh: 英国当局于 5 月对这家加密货币交易所实施了制裁，理由是该交易所涉嫌协助俄罗斯规避制裁。

items.title: The Digital Chamber sues Illinois over incoming crypto transaction tax
items.summary: The Digital Chamber is taking Illinois to court over its decision to pass a law imposing a 0.2% tax on digital asset transactions.
items.title_zh: 数字商会就征收加密交易税起诉伊利诺伊州
items.summary_zh: Digital Chamber 正在将伊利诺伊州告上法庭，因为该州决定通过一项对数字资产交易征收 0.2% 税的法律。

items.title: Canton developer Digital Asset raises additional $10 million at same $2 billion equity valuation
items.summary: Canton Network developer Digital Asset has raised an additional $10 million from Shinhan Financial Group and SC Ventures.
items.title_zh: 广州开发商 Digital Asset 额外融资 1000 万美元，股权估值为 20 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Canton Network 开发商 Digital Asset 已从 Shinhan Financial Group 和 SC Ventures 额外筹集了 1000 万美元。

items.title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
items.summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.
items.title_zh: 与埃芬汉县社区一起建设人工智能基础设施
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布在佐治亚州埃芬汉县推出 Camellia 项目，承诺提供负责任的能源、社区投资、就业机会和获取 Codex 的机会。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
items.summary: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 OpenAI Presence，这是一个经过验证的企业 AI 代理平台，可帮助组织为客户和内部工作流程部署可信的语音和聊天代理。

items.title: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC
items.summary: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC, bringing global leadership in finance, technology, and governance.
items.title_zh: David Vélez 和 Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI 基金会和 OpenAI Group PBC 董事会
items.summary_zh: David Vélez 和 Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI 基金会和 OpenAI Group PBC 董事会，在金融、技术和治理方面发挥全球领导作用。

items.title: A scorecard for the AI age
items.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
items.title_zh: 人工智能时代的记分卡
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 首席财务官 Sarah Friar 推出了实用的 AI 记分卡，通过有用的工作、每项成功任务的成本、可靠性和计算回报来衡量投资回报率。

items.title: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
items.summary: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.
items.title_zh: Cars24 如何利用 OpenAI 扩展对话并加快构建速度
items.summary_zh: Cars24 使用 OpenAI 支持的语音和聊天代理来处理每月超过 100 万分钟的对话时间，恢复 12% 的丢失线索，并为整个公司的团队带来代理工作流程。

items.title: The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
items.title_zh: 物理 AI 仿真现状：概述

items.title: Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
items.title_zh: Grabette：记录机器人操作数据的开放系统

items.title_zh: 安全事件披露 — 2026 年 7 月

items.title: What building Shippy taught us about building agents
items.title_zh: Shippy 的建造教会了我们关于建筑代理的哪些知识

items.title: Welcome Inkling by Thinking Machines
items.title_zh: 欢迎来自 Thinking Machine 的 Inkling

items.title: Introducing Real World VoiceEQ: Measuring the human quality of voice AI
items.title_zh: 真实世界 VoiceEQ 简介：测量语音 AI 的人类质量

items.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 3): Attention is all you profile
items.title_zh: PyTorch 中的分析（第 3 部分）：注意力就是您的分析

items.title: Connect more of your apps to Search
items.summary: You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode.
items.title_zh: 将更多应用程序连接到搜索
items.summary_zh: 您将能够直接在 AI 模式下安全地链接您的首选服务并与之交互。

items.title: Celebrating 25 years of visual search innovation
items.summary: Google Images is turning 25. Here’s a look back at some major milestones — and new ways to explore and create visual content.
items.title_zh: 庆祝视觉搜索创新 25 周年
items.summary_zh: Google 图片即将迎来 25 岁生日。以下是一些重要里程碑的回顾，以及探索和创建视觉内容的新方法。

items.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
items.summary: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini API 中扩展托管代理：后台任务、远程 MCP 等
items.summary_zh: 我们宣布在 Gemini API 中的托管代理中提供新功能，以便开发人员可以构建可靠的、可用于生产的代理。

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: Following the questions where they lead
items.summary: Assistant Professor Bailey Flanigan has arrived at complex computational methods for helping democracy thrive.
items.title_zh: 追随问题的引导
items.summary_zh: 助理教授贝利·弗拉尼根 (Bailey Flanigan) 找到了帮助民主蓬勃发展的复杂计算方法。

items.title: 3 Questions: Neural transparency and the future of AI design
items.summary: Assistant Professor Pat Pataranutaporn describes a new interface that lets everyday users glimpse inside an AI's neural network before their chatbot ever says a word.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：神经透明度和人工智能设计的未来
items.summary_zh: 助理教授帕特·帕塔拉努塔蓬 (Pat Pataranutaporn) 描述了一种新界面，可以让日常用户在聊天机器人说一句话之前就了解人工智能的神经网络内部情况。

items.title: Can AI build a jet engine? JARVIS Challenge tests role of AI copilots in tough-tech engineering
items.summary: MIT students designed, built, and tested a jet engine with AI copilots, assessing AI’s usefulness in developing high-performance aerospace systems.
items.title_zh: 人工智能可以建造喷气发动机吗？贾维斯挑战赛测试人工智能副驾驶在高难度技术工程中的作用
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的学生设计、建造并测试了带有人工智能副驾驶的喷气发动机，评估人工智能在开发高性能航空航天系统中的有用性。

items.title: How MIT students are helping to prevent cyberattacks
items.summary: Students from the MIT Cybersecurity Clinic help local governments and other vulnerable organizations defend against digital threats.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的学生如何帮助防止网络攻击
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院网络安全诊所的学生帮助地方政府和其他脆弱组织抵御数字威胁。

items.title: AI agents create virtual playgrounds to help robots get crucial training data
items.summary: “SceneSmith” system uses collaborative AI agents to create realistic 3D environments of places like kitchens, hotels, and living rooms, where robots can simulate everyday chores.
items.title_zh: 人工智能代理创建虚拟游乐场来帮助机器人获得关键的训练数据
items.summary_zh: “SceneSmith”系统使用协作式 AI 代理来创建厨房、酒店和客厅等场所的逼真 3D 环境，机器人可以在其中模拟日常家务。
